title: Cacimbinhas Approved Bingo
description: A modpack that allows players to play bingo in Minecraft, with a huge focus on optimization and utilities.
body:
This modpack is intended for multiplayer purposes, but it can be fun to play alone as a challenge.

### Bingo
It uses the YetAnotherBingo mod to generate a bingo chart that the players must fight to complete. It allows for up to 8 players and many customizations, such as:
- Time limit
- Lockout mode
- Objectives (X lines, X items, whole card)
- Select the difficulty of items to catch based on an item tier list
- Start with some perks
- Spawn distant between teams
- And much more.

The mod also comes with a pre-built lobby that allows players to configure the bingo the way they deem it best.


### Optimization
This modpack comes with a handful of optimization mods, such as:
- Sodium (and Sodium Extra)
- Lithium
- Indium
- Entity Culling
- FerriteCore
- ImmediatelyFast
- Dynamic FPS
- More Culling
- Clumps
- And much more.

All designed to improve on the optimization of the modpack in all fronts, be it rendering, logic, memory usage, resource usage, etc.


### Utilities
The modpack also has some mods incorporated for utility purposes, such as:
- AppleSkin (Food HUD improvement)
- BetterF3 (Cleaner F3 screen)
- Food Effect Tooltips (More information about the food)
- Jade (Information about the block you're looking at)
- JourneyMap (Minimap)
- Just Enough Items (Crafting recipes for items)
- Mod Menu (Enables quick access to mod configs)
- Mouse Tweeks (Enhances inventory management)
- Status Effect Bars (Better active effects HUD)
- Zoomify (Zoom).


### Graphics
Even though this isn't the focus of the modpack, it comes with Iris and a pre-installed shader pack, aimed at making the lighting and overall feel of Minecraft a bit better. It also makes use of the Dynamic Lights mod to make the whole thing come alive better, allowing items and blocks, such as torches, to interact with the light in a better and smoother way.
